message:
fix(core,db,tools,cli): migration error context, outbox column ordering, env capture, and minor correctness fixes

Add migration_step_error() helper to wrap SQLite migration failures with
the migration id, description, and phase for easier debugging.

Add sqlite_doctor_sanity_with_health_probe() to CLI for robust database
health checks with absolute-path fallback and zero-byte detection.

Broaden CI environment variable capture in flake_triage to match all
CI-prefixed vars (was previously only CI=, CI_, CIRCLECI).

Fix contact_required_error() to sample from sorted/deduped recipient
list instead of raw input. Fix outbox resource query to use positional
column indices (get_as) matching the SELECT order instead of fragile
named lookups. Fix unnecessary String clones in force_release response
JSON construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
